utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What have you been up to ?

utterances.speaker: Jade
utterances.text: Oh , you know , the usual , teaching aerobics , partying way too much .

utterances.speaker: Jade
utterances.text: Oh , and in case you were wondering , those are my legs on the new James Bond poster .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Can you hold on a moment ? I have another call .

utterances.speaker: Jade
utterances.text: So , are we gonna get together or what ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Um , absolutely . Uh , how bout tomorrow afternoon ? Do you know uh , Central Perk in the Village , say , five ... ish ?

utterances.speaker: Jade
utterances.text: Great , I will see you then .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Ok . Ok . Having a phone has finally paid off .

emotion_cause.span: 11_Having a phone has finally paid off .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Even though you do do a good Bob impression , I am thinkin when she sees you tomorow , she is probably gonna realize , " Hey , you are not Bob . "

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am hoping that when Bob does not show up , she will seek comfort in the open arms of the wry stranger at the next table .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh my god . You are pure evil .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Ok , pure evil , horny and alone . I have done this .
